mission: Create one governed checkpoint and retry framework for provider and onboarding automation so mock-now rehearsals and actual-later portal work share the same evidence law, retry vocabulary, live-mutation fence, and secret-safe capture posture.

retry_classes.label: Safe read retry
retry_classes.description: Repeat the read-only step when the target is unchanged and the evidence snapshot is refreshed.
retry_classes.completion_evidence_rule: A fresh gate snapshot or official label match proves completion.
retry_classes.insufficient_evidence_rule: Page load, HTTP 200, or button visibility alone are insufficient.

retry_classes.label: Resume from checkpoint only
retry_classes.description: Do not rerun the whole path. Resume from the last stable draft or checkpoint receipt.
retry_classes.completion_evidence_rule: A stable draft id or checkpoint receipt proves where resume may start.
retry_classes.insufficient_evidence_rule: Filling the same fields again without a checkpoint token is insufficient.

retry_classes.label: Human review before continue
retry_classes.description: Stop after assembling the evidence pack and wait for a named reviewer before any further mutation.
retry_classes.completion_evidence_rule: A named review reference tied to the next intended mutation proves completion.
retry_classes.insufficient_evidence_rule: Internal confidence or green UI state without reviewer identity is insufficient.

retry_classes.label: Capture evidence then stop
retry_classes.description: Capture the minimum safe proof, then stop so a human completes or reviews the external action.
retry_classes.completion_evidence_rule: A safe evidence bundle and handoff record prove the automation did enough.
retry_classes.insufficient_evidence_rule: A screenshot without approval context or redaction proof is insufficient.

retry_classes.label: Never auto repeat
retry_classes.description: Submitting again risks duplicate provider state, duplicate spend, or duplicate onboarding. Never auto-repeat.
retry_classes.completion_evidence_rule: Only the first provider receipt or ticket id can prove completion.
retry_classes.insufficient_evidence_rule: Button-click success or page refresh after submit are insufficient.

retry_classes.label: Secrets redacted only
retry_classes.description: The step handles secret material. Captures are allowed only when redaction is proven and approved.
retry_classes.completion_evidence_rule: A vault receipt or quarantined masked evidence handle proves completion.
retry_classes.insufficient_evidence_rule: Clipboard copies, raw traces, HAR files, or unmasked screenshots are insufficient.

action_rows.action_label: Review NHS login partner application route
completion_evidence: Fresh gate snapshot stamped with the capture date
Official label checks still match the current NHS login guidance
insufficient_evidence: Landing on the page
A visible submit button or populated draft fields without a dated snapshot
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked stills only. Never expose redirect URIs, emails, or client identifiers in raw captures.
action_rows.summary: Re-open the rehearsal field pack, verify the current official labels, and capture a fresh gate snapshot without mutating the provider route.

action_rows.action_label: Approve redirect and scope registration pack
completion_evidence: Named redirect review reference linked to the active route family
Scope approval reference tied to the same environment target
insufficient_evidence: A locally generated redirect list without reviewer identity
A button click that never yields a review reference
action_rows.redaction_policy: Allow masked stills of the review pack only after route-specific identifiers are obscured.
action_rows.summary: Bind the redirect URI and scope pack to a named reviewer before any real registration step can proceed.

action_rows.action_label: Promote NHS login credentials into vault-handled storage
completion_evidence: Vault or quarantine receipt for the secret material
Named approver bound to the same environment target
Redaction approval reference for any still capture
insufficient_evidence: Clipboard copies
Raw screenshots, traces, HAR files, or logs containing secret material
action_rows.redaction_policy: Traces and HAR are off. Only masked stills with an explicit redaction approval reference are allowed.
action_rows.summary: Handle client credentials or secret material only through masked capture and later vault receipts.

action_rows.action_label: Review GP provider path evidence and shortlist posture
completion_evidence: Fresh path evidence snapshot
Official supplier labels still match the current provider guidance
insufficient_evidence: A remembered shortlist with no capture date
A locally sorted table with no source snapshot
action_rows.redaction_policy: Screenshots may be taken because no secret fields are involved, but route-specific tickets must still be masked.
action_rows.summary: Inspect the provider pathfinder and official label checks without opening a real supplier path.

action_rows.action_label: Resume IM1 prerequisite dossier drafting
completion_evidence: Draft checkpoint receipt tied to the active supplier pair
Current capability and architecture evidence refs attached to the same draft
insufficient_evidence: Re-entering the form from scratch
A screenshot of completed fields with no draft receipt
action_rows.redaction_policy: Allow masked draft screenshots only before commit and only when legal placeholders are still synthetic.
action_rows.summary: Draft the prerequisite dossier only from the last saved checkpoint so sponsor placeholders and supplier evidence do not drift.
live_gate_titles: Provider capability model frozen enough for submission
Safety, privacy, DPIA, architecture, and data-flow artifacts current

action_rows.action_label: Review IM1 supported-test admissibility
completion_evidence: Named admissibility review reference
Bounded MVP statement and supplier capability evidence linked to the same review
insufficient_evidence: A completed request form with no reviewer identity
A provider portal login with no bounded-use-case sign-off
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked stills only. Legal names and supplier identifiers stay outside raw captures.
action_rows.summary: Stop after assembling the supported-test request and wait for an admissibility review rather than replaying the flow.
live_gate_titles: Credible MVP/demo and bounded IM1 use case
Provider capability model frozen enough for submission

action_rows.action_label: Capture IM1 signatory handoff evidence and stop
completion_evidence: Legal handoff reference or ticket id
Named sponsor, commercial owner, and approver identities stored outside the repo
insufficient_evidence: Unapproved legal names in draft fields
A screenshot of signatory slots without a handoff reference
action_rows.redaction_policy: Only masked stills of role labels are allowed. No real legal names or signatory details appear in captures.
action_rows.summary: Collect the minimum masked proof that the legal handoff is ready, then stop before any signatory or legal mutation.
live_gate_titles: Named sponsor and commercial owner posture known

action_rows.action_label: Submit IM1 provider request once
completion_evidence: Provider ticket or receipt id for the exact submission
Named approver, environment target, and explicit live flag bound to the same commit
insufficient_evidence: A clicked button with no provider receipt
Refreshing the page and assuming the request landed
action_rows.redaction_policy: Commit-phase screenshots are disabled by default. If a still is required, it must be masked and approved before capture.
action_rows.summary: A real IM1 submission is a one-shot commit. Any ambiguity after submit goes to reconciliation, not replay.

action_rows.action_label: Resume PDS use-case and risk-pack drafting
completion_evidence: Draft receipt linked to the chosen access mode
Current hazard and risk log references attached to the same draft
insufficient_evidence: A restated use case without route binding
A green UI with no hazard or risk evidence refs
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked draft captures are allowed, but patient-like identifiers and organisation details must stay synthetic or obscured.
action_rows.summary: Resume the route-bound PDS use-case pack from its last checkpoint rather than replaying the onboarding form.
live_gate_titles: Exact access mode selected and justified
Risk logs are current for each access mode used

action_rows.action_label: Review PDS legal basis and feature-flag approval
completion_evidence: Named legal or governance approval reference
Rollback rehearsal evidence tied to the same route-bound access mode
insufficient_evidence: A draft legal basis paragraph with no approver identity
An assumed rollback plan with no rehearsal reference
action_rows.redaction_policy: Only masked stills of approval metadata are allowed. No patient or operator identifiers in captures.
action_rows.summary: Legal basis, feature-flag scope, and rollback posture require named review before any real PDS access can open.
live_gate_titles: PDS legal basis and feature-flag approval
Rollback and kill switch have been rehearsed

action_rows.action_label: Resume MESH mailbox application drafting
completion_evidence: Application draft receipt linked to the mailbox row
Current owner ODS and minimum-necessary review refs on the same draft
insufficient_evidence: Re-entering owner details with no checkpoint receipt
A filled form with no proof of liaison or minimum-necessary review
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked stills allowed before commit. ODS identifiers may appear only if the pack is still synthetic or approved.
action_rows.summary: Resume the mailbox application from its last checkpoint so owner ODS and manager mode stay consistent.
live_gate_titles: Mailbox owner ODS posture is known
Third-party mailbox manager posture is decided
Minimum-necessary payload and proof review is current

action_rows.action_label: Submit MESH workflow request once
completion_evidence: Workflow request or mailbox ticket id
Named approver and environment target bound to the same attempt
insufficient_evidence: A clicked submit button with no request id
A page refresh implying the workflow already exists
action_rows.redaction_policy: Commit-phase capture is disabled unless a masked still is explicitly approved for the evidence pack.
action_rows.summary: A MESH workflow request is a non-idempotent provider mutation. Submit exactly once or escalate to human reconciliation.
live_gate_titles: Live API onboarding is complete for any live API mailbox request
Named approver and environment target are present
Real mutation and spend acknowledgements are enabled

action_rows.action_label: Resume telephony account and number plan drafting
completion_evidence: Draft receipt for the chosen vendor and number profile
Current recording policy and webhook security refs attached to the same draft
insufficient_evidence: Re-filling the vendor console from scratch
A selected vendor with no recording or webhook evidence refs
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked draft captures only. Secret refs may appear only as vault handles, never raw secrets.
action_rows.summary: Resume telephony project setup from the last draft so webhook, recording, and spend posture stay in one evidence bundle.

action_rows.action_label: Purchase or bind a telephony number once
completion_evidence: Provider number or purchase receipt
Spend approval reference and named approver tied to the same action
insufficient_evidence: Seeing a candidate number in the console
Assuming success because the page stayed open after submit
action_rows.redaction_policy: No unapproved commit-phase captures. Any evidence still must mask account identifiers and numbers until the receipt is archived safely.
action_rows.summary: Buying or binding a number can create spend and external state. Never auto-repeat after commit.

action_rows.action_label: Resume notification project and sender draft
completion_evidence: Project draft receipt for the chosen provider family
Current repair, migration, and scope references bound to the same draft
insufficient_evidence: Re-entering project details with no checkpoint receipt
A chosen sender identity with no environment or repair posture
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked draft captures only. Sender refs may appear as identity handles, never raw credentials or tokens.
action_rows.summary: Resume the notification project draft from the last stable checkpoint so scope, repair posture, and sender identity stay aligned.

action_rows.action_label: Capture sender or domain verification evidence and stop
completion_evidence: Ownership or DNS handoff reference
Signed webhook security reference for the same sender or domain identity
insufficient_evidence: A pending verification badge with no ownership ticket
A screenshot of DNS tokens with no approval or masking
action_rows.redaction_policy: Only masked stills are allowed. DNS tokens, webhook secrets, and raw sender identifiers must be obscured.
action_rows.summary: Capture the minimum evidence that sender or domain verification is ready, then stop for manual DNS or ownership work.
live_gate_titles: Signed webhook and replay fence pack

action_rows.action_label: Resume evidence-processing provider draft
completion_evidence: Draft receipt for the chosen provider and project scope
Current region, retention, storage, and quarantine references
insufficient_evidence: A provider selection with no policy refs
A draft screenshot with no checkpoint receipt
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked draft captures only. Storage names and project identifiers may appear only when approved and non-secret.
action_rows.summary: Resume provider project setup from the current checkpoint so region, retention, storage, and quarantine posture stay bound together.
live_gate_titles: Retention and deletion policy is explicit
Bucket or storage scope is declared

action_rows.action_label: Capture evidence-processing webhook secret handling safely
completion_evidence: Vault receipt for the webhook secret reference
Current replay-control and callback security evidence
insufficient_evidence: A raw secret visible in the console, trace, or screenshot
An unmasked callback URL capture with embedded secret material
action_rows.redaction_policy: Traces and HAR stay off. Console logs must be scrubbed. Masked stills are allowed only with redaction proof.
action_rows.summary: Treat webhook-secret entry and secret-backed callback wiring as a redaction-first evidence capture step.
live_gate_titles: Webhook security and replay controls are ready
Named approver and target environment are present

action_rows.action_label: Review pharmacy directory and access path evidence
completion_evidence: Fresh route snapshot showing the current preferred, fallback, and manual paths
Official label checks still match current pharmacy guidance
insufficient_evidence: A remembered preferred route with no snapshot
A visual table with no captured evidence date
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked stills are allowed; route data is not secret, but practice-specific identifiers still need masking if present.
action_rows.summary: Review directory, Update Record, and manual fallback evidence without trying to open a live pharmacy route.
live_gate_titles: Transport scorecards and message-route evidence are approved

action_rows.action_label: Commit a pharmacy dispatch route once
completion_evidence: Named transport route tuple or provider receipt
Current dispatch proof thresholds and approver evidence bound to the same attempt
insufficient_evidence: Transport acceptance alone
A clicked route-claim button with no tuple receipt or proof threshold record
action_rows.redaction_policy: Commit-phase screenshots are disabled unless an explicitly approved masked still is required for audit.
action_rows.summary: Choosing and opening a live dispatch route is a non-idempotent mutation that must never be replayed automatically.
live_gate_titles: Named approver and target environment are present
Gap and watch register is clear for the attempted route
Update Record assured combination is named

action_rows.action_label: Capture urgent-return rehearsal evidence and stop
completion_evidence: Urgent-return ownership or rehearsal reference
Current manual recovery proof linked to the active route attempt
insufficient_evidence: A runbook mention with no rehearsal date
A screenshot of the manual fallback row with no owner or rehearsal reference
action_rows.redaction_policy: Only masked stills of rehearsal metadata are allowed. No patient, clinician, or mailbox content belongs in captures.
action_rows.summary: Collect proof that the urgent-return safety net is owned and rehearsed, then stop without trying to automate the manual path itself.
live_gate_titles: Urgent return ownership and rehearsal are current
Phase 0 external foundation gate is open

action_rows.action_label: Resume NHS App EOI and environment pack drafting
completion_evidence: Draft receipt for the current NHS App stage pack
Current NHS login readiness, eligibility, and demo references
insufficient_evidence: A completed form with no stage receipt
A design preview with no scope or demo evidence references
action_rows.redaction_policy: Masked draft captures only. Any service identifiers or unpublished scope text must be obscured.
action_rows.summary: Resume the NHS App EOI and environment pack from the last stable checkpoint so scope, demo, and eligibility evidence stay aligned.
live_gate_titles: NHS login readiness sufficient for NHS App progression

action_rows.action_label: Review NHS App commissioning and assurance gate
completion_evidence: Named commissioning or sponsor approval reference
Current accessibility, design, and service evidence refs
Named approver and environment target for the same path
insufficient_evidence: A green-looking preview with no sponsor-approved wording
A filled approver field with no assurance evidence pack
action_rows.redaction_policy: Only masked stills of the gate board are allowed. No unpublished service data or live credentials belong in captures.
action_rows.summary: Commissioning, accessibility, design readiness, and service posture require named review before the NHS App path can widen.
live_gate_titles: Service desk and incident posture current
